title: Example Normal University humanities thesis formatting requirements

sourceDocuments.title: Fictionalized humanities format note
sourceDocuments.notes: Public fictional source note. No real institution source file is included.

requirements.title: A4 portrait page and margins
requirements.description: Thesis pages use A4 portrait pages with fixed margins and header/footer distances.
requirements.normalizedValue: A4 portrait; top/bottom 2.54 cm; left/right 3.17 cm; header/footer 2.0 cm

requirements.title: Front matter uses Roman page numbers
requirements.description: Front matter sections use upper Roman page numbers and restart at one.

evidence.shortQuote: Front matter restarts with Roman numerals.

requirements.title: Body uses decimal page numbers
requirements.description: Body sections use decimal page numbers and restart at one.

requirements.title: Body paragraph font and spacing
requirements.description: Body text uses Songti Chinese, Times New Roman Latin, 12 pt, first-line indent 2 characters, and fixed-looking line spacing.

evidence.shortQuote: Body paragraphs use 12 pt text and 2-character first-line indent.

requirements.normalizedValue: 宋体/Times New Roman, 12 pt, first-line indent 2 chars, lineSpacingMultiple 1.67
requirements.notes: Stage 1 stores line spacing as a multiple.

requirements.title: Heading hierarchy
requirements.description: Main titles use Heiti 16 pt bold centered; second-level titles use Heiti 15 pt centered; third-level titles use Heiti 14 pt left aligned.

evidence.shortQuote: Heading levels use Heiti with distinct size and alignment.

requirements.normalizedValue: H1 16 pt bold centered; H2 15 pt centered; H3 14 pt left

requirements.title: Centered header
requirements.description: Header text is centered with a header line and page numbers centered in the footer.

evidence.shortQuote: Header is centered; page numbers are centered.

requirements.normalizedValue: centered static header and centered page number
requirements.notes: Dynamic chapter headers are outside this public example.

requirements.title: TOC levels 1-3
requirements.description: The table of contents includes heading levels 1 through 3.
requirements.normalizedValue: TOC title 目录; minLevel 1; maxLevel 3; Word field code

requirements.title: Cover fields
requirements.description: The cover contains a fictional mark, school code, student number, thesis title, degree type, college, major, research direction, author, advisor, and completion date.

evidence.shortQuote: Cover contains school and thesis metadata fields.

requirements.normalizedValue: Cover page template with metadata and variables
requirements.notes: Implemented with page template layout blocks.

requirements.title: Declaration pages
requirements.description: The template renders originality and thesis-use authorization declaration text with signature/date fields.

evidence.shortQuote: Declaration pages include signatures and dates.

requirements.normalizedValue: Declaration page template with fixed declaration text and signature fields
requirements.notes: Mapped to declarationText page template block.

requirements.title: Numbered bibliography
requirements.description: Bibliography entries render as structured numbered entries.
requirements.normalizedValue: Reference title 参考文献; numeric bibliography markers
requirements.notes: Semantic citation style review is outside this fictional example.

mappings.notes: Mapped to front matter section format.
Mapped to centered static header/footer rules.
Mapped to Word TOC field levels 1-3.

approval.notes: Fictionalized public example approved for repository tests. It does not claim real institution compliance.
